raw.objective: [1] “to investigate the pharmacokinetics and safety of a single i.m. dose of fosphenytoin in children with severe malaria but who were seizure free at the start of the study” and [2] “to investigate the effect of concomitant administration of chloramphenicol on the pharmacokinetics and safety of phenytoin in children with CM”
raw.covariates: Tested: comedications with chloramphenicol or cefotaxime Included: -
raw.observations: An elaborate model is presented that takes into account both intramuscular and central conversion of fosphenytoin into phenytoin, but only the final elimination parameter is reported, thereby making it impossible to perform simulations based on the model.
raw.structure: 5-compartment model with first-order absorption and elimination
raw.equations: K12=theta1*exp(eta1) ‡ K13=theta2*exp(eta2) ‡ K24=theta3*exp(eta3) ‡ K34=theta4*exp(eta4) ‡ K45=theta5*exp(eta5) † dA(1)/dt=-K12*A(1) –K13*A(1) dA(2)/dt=K12*A(1) –K24*A(2) dA(3)/dt=K13*A(1) –K34*A(3) dA(4)/dt=K24*A(2) +K34*A(3) –K45*A(4) dA(5)/dt=K45*A(4) † Inter-individual variability of all PK parameters was assumed to be log-normally distributed, although no information is provided in the text ‡here calculated using the SD and mean of the estimate, which may not be the same as the actual variance of the parameter
raw.parameter_values: theta1=? theta2=? theta3=? theta4=? theta5=0.03 omega1=? omega2=? omega3=? omega4=? omega5=0.11‡

structural_model.description: 5-compartment model with first-order absorption and elimination

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: [1] “to investigate the pharmacokinetics and safety of a single i.m. dose of fosphenytoin in children with severe malaria but who were seizure free at the start of the study” and [2] “to investigate the effect of concomitant administration of chloramphenicol on the pharmacokinetics and safety of phenytoin in children with CM”

covariates.raw: Tested: comedications with chloramphenicol or cefotaxime Included: -

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
